positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical celestial biome illustration merging elements of botany and astronomy. Focus on stylized crescent moons, abstract constellations, and interwoven flora (such as bioluminescent ferns, geometric vines, and stylized lunar orchids). The composition should form a perfect circular medallion suitable for apparel printing, featuring strong, crisp silhouettes against a minimal background. Style: Detailed scientific engraving mixed with Art Nouveau linework, high contrast, predominantly black and deep indigo ink on a cream ground. Excellent negative space and geometric repetition are key. Clean vector aesthetic, symmetrical composition, Zentangle influences. Midday flat lighting, ultra-detailed, printable.
